'''zakasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yokai|yokai]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-k-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yokai|yokai]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zakasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zækæshæth|zækæshæth]] || [[word:zækæshæj|zækæshæj]] || [[word:zækæshæsh|zækæshæsh]] || [[word:zækæshæ|zækæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zakakashath|zakakashath]] || [[word:zakakashaj|zakakashaj]] || [[word:zakakashash|zakakashash]] || [[word:zakakasha|zakakasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zakashath|zakashath]] || [[word:zakashaj|zakashaj]] || [[word:zakashash|zakashash]] || [[word:zakasha|zakasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zakafshath|zakafshath]] || [[word:zakafshaj|zakafshaj]] || [[word:zakafshash|zakafshash]] || [[word:zakafshaf|zakafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zakashatha|zakashatha]] || [[word:zakashaja|zakashaja]] || [[word:zakashasha|zakashasha]] || [[word:zakashaka|zakashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zakashath|zakashath]] || [[word:zakashaj|zakashaj]] || [[word:zakashash|zakashash]] || [[word:zakasha|zakasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zakashathal|zakashathal]] || [[word:zakashajal|zakashajal]] || [[word:zakashashal|zakashashal]] || [[word:zakashakal|zakashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zakashathatha|zakashathatha]] || [[word:zakashajaja|zakashajaja]] || [[word:zakashashasha|zakashashasha]] || [[word:zakashaka|zakashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zakashathan|zakashathan]] || [[word:zakashajan|zakashajan]] || [[word:zakashashan|zakashashan]] || [[word:zakashakan|zakashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zakashathaoro|zakashathaoro]] || [[word:zakashajaoro|zakashajaoro]] || [[word:zakashashaoro|zakashashaoro]] || [[word:zakashakaoro|zakashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
